turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ordering Coffee at a Café

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, I would like to order a coffee today!”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! What kind of coffee would you like today — something like a latte, cappuccino, or maybe just a black coffee? Me : “One latte and one cappuccino, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, a vanilla latte coming up. Would you like that hot or iced? Me : I’d like to hot please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, hot vanilla latte. And would you prefer a particular milk—like regular, oat, or almond?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'd like to oak milk, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, oat milk it is. And would you like any extra flavor shots or maybe a bit of whipped cream on top?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Name on top, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure thing, we’ll add some whipped cream on top. Now, will this be for here or to go?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I’d like to take away please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem, we'll make it to go. Finally, can I get your name for the order? Me : “My name is Laila.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thanks, Lara. We’ve got that all set. Just one last thing: would you like to pay by card or cash today? συνο"strings to match"urls to matchurls. Me :“I would like to pay by credit card.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, card is perfect. We’ll just run that through and you’ll be all set. Thanks for ordering with us! Let me know if you need anything else. Me :“Can I have one question.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, feel free to ask whatever you need. What else can I help you with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I have one chocolate chip cookie? Can I have one chocolate chip cookie?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, you sure can. We’ve got some chocolate chip cookies right at the counter. Anything else you'd like to add on? Me : “Yes, nothing else.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, I'll just add that cookie for you. That should do it. Thanks for your order, and enjoy your coffee and cookie! Me : “Yes, thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! Enjoy and have a great day, Lara. Me : “Thank you so very much.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're welcome! Take care and see you next time. Me : “See you next time!”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, see you then! Thanks again and have a good one! Me : 텍스트 기록 사용할 수 없음

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hey there! It looks like we're all set. If you need anything else, just let me know. Me : “Can I change the milk?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, go right ahead and let me know what you'd like to change. Me : “Yeah, I don't like to. General milk, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, let's shift gears. If you want to practice a different scenario or change up how we’re chatting, just let me know what you have in mind and we’ll dive right in. Me :“Could you say that again?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! I'll switch it up. Just let me know what new role or scenario you’d like, and we’ll roll with it. Me :텍스트 기록 사용할 수 없음

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All right, sounds good! Just let me know the new scenario whenever you're ready, and we'll jump right in.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “OK, thanks.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're welcome! Just let me know anytime if you want to dive into a new scenario. I'm here whenever you're ready. Me : “Yeah, thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Happy to help. Just let me know if you need anything else.
